title: cymbidium tessellatum
intro: Cymbidium tessellatum, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cymbidium tessellatum are said to include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent to soothe skin irritations. Cymbidium tessellatum is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, which is then administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
